_comment: Per-day Utility Porter assignments for the Zone Deployment Book. Up to 8 entries per date (anything beyond is ignored). Each entry is {role, name}. role is typically AM or PM (which shift portion the porter covers); leave empty if unknown. Brian's intent (4/29/26): future weekly schedules will include Utility Porter rows; until then this file is populated manually (or left empty for all-Unfilled cards).
